records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/, the opposite of <?/; <?/ day + <?/ of <?/. See Nyctalopia.]

defs: A disease of the eyes, in consequence of which a person can see clearly or without pain only by daylight or a strong artificial light; day sight.
notes: ☞ Some writers (as Quain) use the word in the opposite sense, i. e., day blindness. See Nyctalopia.
